entries.value: Wannan yanayin an tsara shi ne don mai kwaikwayon nazarin harka tare da nasa saƙonnin, misalai, da tsarin koyo.

entries.value: Daidaita zaman da burinka

Yanayin Wasan Kwaikwayo

entries.value: Yi atisaye kan tattaunawar sulhu, rikici, tallafin abokin ciniki, jagoranci, ko kowace tattaunawa mai muhimmanci.
